commentaries.author: Douay Rheims 1609
commentaries.content:
And David said to God: I have sinned exceedingly in that I would do this: I beseech thee take away (b) the iniquity of thy servant, because I have done foolishly.
(b) King David was not without faith, nor hope, and yet was contaminate with iniquity, from which he prayed to be delivered.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Semei; perhaps Sama, ver. 13. (Calmet)
Septuagint read, Samai. (Haydock)
